channel.title: ShovelsSale Dispatch
channel.description: The analytical publication layer of ShovelsSale.com — structured releases on classification, infrastructure, dependency, and control.

item.title: Dispatch 008 — GitHub and the Developer System-of-Record Layer
item.description: Dispatch 008 classifies GitHub as a developer system-of-record layer across code, collaboration, CI/CD, identity, and ecosystem infrastructure.

item.title: Dispatch 003 — Domain Names as Strategic Digital Shovels
item.description: Dispatch 003 classifies domain names as strategic digital shovels through naming infrastructure, trust, routing, memory, and category control.

item.title: Dispatch 004 — Oracle and the Enterprise System-of-Record Layer
item.description: Dispatch 004 classifies Oracle as enterprise system-of-record infrastructure: database, ERP, operational memory, and control-layer dependency.

item.title: Dispatch 005 — Cloudflare and the Control Layer of the Modern Web
item.description: Dispatch 005 classifies Cloudflare as a web control-layer hybrid across DNS, security, access, edge execution, and developer infrastructure.

item.title: Dispatch 006 — Stripe and the Payment Rails Beneath Internet Commerce
item.description: Dispatch 006 classifies Stripe as payment-rails infrastructure for payments, billing, marketplaces, and programmable revenue operations.

item.title: Dispatch 007 — Shopify and the Commerce Operating System
item.description: Dispatch 007 classifies Shopify as a commerce operating-system layer for storefronts, checkout, payments, apps, and merchant operations.

item.title: Why NVIDIA Is a Shovel Layer Asset | Dispatch 001
item.description: Dispatch 001 classifies NVIDIA as a shovel layer asset in the AI market structure using the ShovelsSale scanner framework.

item.title: Dispatch 002 — ASML and the Infrastructure of Irreplaceability
item.description: ASML controls the machines that make advanced chips, positioning it as a Control Layer asset in the AI economy.
